mapper.select:
SELECT A.ADOPTION_ID AS adoptionId,
'APP-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') || '-' || LPAD(A.ADOPTION_ID, 5, '0') AS approvalNo,
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS approvalDate,
A.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS applyDate, TO_CHAR(A.VISIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS visitDate, A.STATUS AS status,
M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, M.PHONE AS phone,
AD.JOB AS job, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(AD.ADDRESS, 4000, 1) AS address,
AN.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, AN.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, AN.BREED AS breed, AN.GENDER AS gender, AN.AGE AS age,
AM.NEUTERED AS neutered,
TO_CHAR(AR.RESCUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rescueDate
FROM ADOPTION A JOIN MEMBER M ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ADOPTION_DETAIL AD ON A.ADOPTION_ID = AD.ADOPTION_ID JOIN ANIMAL AN ON A.ANIMAL_ID = AN.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_MEDICAL AM ON AN.ANIMAL_ID = AM.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_RESCUE AR ON AN.ANIMAL_ID = AR.ANIMAL_ID
WHERE A.ADOPTION_ID = #{adoptionId} AND A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND A.STATUS = '승인'
